news.headline: Ontario Premier Doug Ford agrees to sell $21m private jet following outcry
news.summary: After confirming the purchase on Friday, Ford drew critcism from political opponents who called it a "gravy plane" and "out of touch".

news.headline: In 45-minute phone call with Pezeshkian, PM Shehbaz reaffirms Pakistan’s commitment to advancing regional peace
news.summary:
<p>Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif held a telephone call with Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian on Sunday, reaffirming during the conversation that Pakistan would “remain fully committed to its honest and sincere efforts to advance regional peace and security”.</p>

news.headline: Israeli ministers celebrate re-establishment of Sa-Nur West Bank settlement
